---
description: "Use when a request spans multiple domains and you need a coordinator plan across multiple specialist agents in Party Operations."
---

Use orchestrator-workers for this request:

`{{REQUEST}}`

## Worker Selection
Choose only the workers needed from:
- Functionality Integrity Analyst
- Gameplay Fun & Balance Analyst
- Foundry Permissions Intent Analyst
- UI/UX Player & GM Analyst
- Workspace Performance & Refactor Analyst
- Explore

## Coordinator Output
1. Why multi-agent is necessary (brief)
2. Worker assignments (scope + expected output)
3. Merge strategy for conflicting recommendations
4. Ordered implementation plan with smallest-risk-first sequencing
5. Validation plan mapped to changed subsystems

Avoid parallel workers when a single specialist can resolve the request.
